entries.name: Bay Tour
entries.memory: Golden Gate pass at sunset — the light was unreal.

entries.name: Santa Barbara Coastal Hop
entries.memory: Flew low along the coast just south of Point Conception. The kids were glued to the windows the whole time.

entries.name: Brackett Pattern Work
entries.memory: Six touch-and-goes on a cool, calm morning. Mountains were crystal clear after the last rain.
